subject: Re: Allegations of Fraud - JC Household
body_text:
It is YOUR JOB to tell me if you have received payment

On Thu, Feb 5, 2026 at 8:36 AM Tilton, Kati <KTilton@clackamas.us> wrote:

> Hello,
>
>
>
> The Money Management Program is operated out of Clackamas County Social
> Services. You can contact them directly to speak about the status of their
> payment: 503-655-8640.
>
>
> Thank you,
>
>
> Kati
>
>
>
> Kati Tilton
>
> 971-201-8582
>
> Operations Manager, Housing Authority of Clackamas County
>
>
>
> *From:* benjamin barber <starworks5@gmail.com>
> *Sent:* Thursday, February 5, 2026 7:07 AM
> *To:* Tilton, Kati <KTilton@clackamas.us>; Williams, Billy <
> BWilliams@clackamas.us>
> *Subject:* Re: Allegations of Fraud - JC Household
>
>
>
> *Warning: External email. Be cautious opening attachments and links.*
> * ------------------------------ *
>
>
> ------------------------------
>
> Also, Jemiliah at money management on 2/2/2025 said that she was going to
> send you a check, and told me not to keep paying jane's rent, because it is
> leading to her having too much money (i pay rent 2 weeks early), confirm
> with me that she has actually done her job and that I dont need to hand
> deliver payment, because yet another clackamas county employee sucks at
> their jobs.
>
>
>
> On Wed, Feb 4, 2026 at 5:14 PM benjamin barber <starworks5@gmail.com>
> wrote:
>
> cc: Bill Williams, Clackamas County Counsel
>
> You should go talk to the Clackamas county counsel, and ask them about
> first amendment retaliation, and whether first amendment rights can be
> waived as a condition of a government benefit, and ask chatgpt before you
> send me legally frivolous notices. As you are aware the State of Oregon
> explicitly allows nudity during protests, including a man who got
> completely naked in front of the airport, and the offer while lewd does not
> amount to a "hostile work environment" claim, because I dont have any
> actual power over the officials workplace, your claim is merely that a
> government employee was exposed to offensive speech (not even nudity).
>
>
> https://www.oregonlive.com/portland/2012/07/portlands_airport_stripper_joh.html
>
> If you thought that it was inappropriate for me to communicate the
> problems that you are trying to cause with me and my mother, then you
> clearly should have anticipated the problems you were causing, before you
> had gone to the extent of causing those problems in the first place, and
> should have refrained from causing those problems to begin with. You should
> also be aware of the "unclean hands doctrine", whereby you cannot create a
> problem and then complain that the person whose problems you have caused,
> have exercised their first amendment right to petition the government for
> redress of grievances.
>
> https://www.congress.gov/crs-product/LSB11338
>
> Moreover even if you wanted to enforce this letter you would have to
> explain the selective enforcement, for example not disenchanting Julio who
> admitted to fraud in a court, or my neighbor laura whose rental has been
> used as a storage facility, while she lives in a completely different house
> for 2 years, or my neighbor carlos who fabricates adopting his grandson to
> get another room on his lease, but instead only enforcing rules against the
> person who accuses your organization and their partners of legal
> wrongdoing. You would have to explain why some offensive speech was somehow
> a worse breach of conduct than actual financial fraud, and violations of
> racial discrimination laws, that went unpunished by the county.
>
>
> https://www.eeoc.gov/laws/guidance/enforcement-guidance-retaliation-and-related-issues#3._Examples
>
> You should have already been informed, that I am working on a
> neurosymbolic system to automate legal reasoning over the entire legal
> corpus, with the intention of using it against government bodies who
> flagrantly violate the laws and constitution of Oregon and the United
> States.
> You should have also been aware or informed that I was intending this
> controversy to go to the US district court, whereby I was going to use the
> automated AI systems that I'm building to go after the county under the
> civil rights fraud initiative of the DOJ
>
> https://www.justice.gov/dag/media/1400826/dl?inline
>
> That being said, the documents you have requested have been delivered to
> your organization, so tell me when you're going to resolve the outstanding
> problems that have been caused by your agency, so that I dont have any need
> to communicate with your agency any further, so that we can move out of the
> jurisdiction of clackamas county to begin with.
>
>
>
>
> My discussion with the Centaur AI neurosymbolic AI research institute
> https://www.youtube.com/live/FI7QTEHIzRY?si=HosHFYyHb87zBaZP&t=2362
>
> My participation in the most recent Stanford Law CODEX (computer science
> and law) meeting.
> https://youtu.be/dwuNcY-dm6A?si=6i--DvEZoI-rhflc&t=1374
>
> My software for neurosymbolic legal reasoning
>
> https://github.com/endomorphosis/ipfs_datasets_py/blob/main/docs/guides/LEGAL_DEONTIC_LOGIC_USER_GUIDE.md
>
>
>
>
>
> On Wed, Feb 4, 2026 at 2:38 PM Tilton, Kati <KTilton@clackamas.us> wrote:
>
> Mr. Barber,
>
>
>
> Your recent communication with Ashely Ferron is both concerning and
> inappropriate. Per the email I sent you on December 11th, I noted that
> the Housing Authority expects that communication between HACC and those
> external to HACC (participants, community partners, etc.) is safe and
> respectful. This recent communication from you is a clear deviation from
> these expectations. Moving forward, you are to communicate with myself,
> only. Our communication will continue to be in writing to ensure that we
> have an accurate accounting and record of information being shared between
> the Housing Authority and you/your household. Communication will be
> strictly limited to discussing your household eligibility, voucher
> issuance, and next steps for your move. Further communication that is
> explicit or implicit harassment, sexual in nature, derogatory, abusive,
> intimidating, threatening or otherwise inappropriate will be once again
> considered violation of your lease with the Housing Authority.
>
>
>
> I appreciate your attention to this serious matter and expect immediate
> correction to your interaction with the Housing Authority moving forward.
>
>
>
> PLEASE NOTE: The attached notice will also be mailed to you by first class
> mail.
>
>
>
> Kati
>
>
>
>
>
> Kati Tilton
>
> 971-201-8582
>
> Operations Manager, Housing Authority of Clackamas County
>
>
>

> with the use of other programs.
>
> I will attempt to complete the intake form yet again, and I will have her
> send her photo ID along with the intake form as well.
>
> To the extent that you want us to share a one bedroom apartment, she has
> to have enough room for her mobility scooter, walker, and personal effects
> in her room. Moreover I am a sexually active male and dont think it's
> appropriate that I have sex in the same bedroom with my mother in it.
>
>
>
> On Thu, Jan 29, 2026 at 11:13 AM Ferron, Ashley <AFerron@clackamas.us>
> wrote:
>
> Hello,
>
> Following a preliminary review of the returned intake packet, we
> identified required corrections and missing documentation. Please refer to
> the attached letter for specific details.
>
> Blank copies of the forms that were incomplete or incorrectly completed
> are included for your reference. Please submit the corrected materials as
> outlined so that processing may continue.
>
> Please also be advised that, based on the reported household composition,
> the household will now be eligible for a one-bedroom voucher instead of a
> 2-bedroom voucher.
>
>
>
> Thank you,
>
> * Ashley Ferron*
> Pronouns (she/her)
> Policy, Performance & Research Analyst, Sr.
> Clackamas County Housing & Community Development Division (HCD)
>

>
> My focus is ensuring the successful relocation of all families on the
> property. At this time, Jane’s household has chosen to port to Multnomah

>
> This process does not involve any prior interactions with Quantum
> Residential. I’m also unable to speak to Quantum Residential’s operations.
> Our discussions will be limited to questions related to future housing
> needs only.
>
> I will review the intake packet once it is received and will notify you if
> anything is missing. If all required documentation is provided, we will
> process the paperwork and issue a voucher. An orientation will then be
> required, after which the household’s file can be ported to Multnomah
> County.
>

>
> Thank you,

> Yes the questions are:
>
> 1) If you accept the fact that I did submit an application to live at the
> blossom, why did they retain the documentation instead of sending it to
> your office, this seems similar to other allegations present in the
> Portland Mercury ?
> 2) why did they report to me that that I was unable to have my dog live
> with me, despite that apparently other prospective tenants were allowed 2
> dogs of larger size (an american husky and a border collie)?
> 3) was the letter that we received stating, that the apartments at the
> blossom might not be ready before we are expected to be evicted from this
> residence, arise as a result of the negligence of quantum reality?
>
> The current conflict arises due in part due to in large part these issues,
> and it seems to be similar to issues that they have been involved in before.
>
>
> https://www.portlandmercury.com/news/2025/01/29/47623121/priced-out-of-affordable-housing-city-sides-with-property-owner-in-dispute-over-rents#:~:text=Thomas%20also%20received%20a%20request,been%20in%20an%20affordable%20unit
> .
>
>
>

>
> Hello,
>
> Thank you for following up. You do not need to resend any of the documents
> that were included in the attachments previously sent to you.
>
> Once we receive the remaining documentation you are submitting, and we are
> able to confirm that all required items have been received, we will
> continue processing the voucher.
>
> Now that your household has chosen to move forward with the voucher and to
> port to Multnomah County, you do not need to visit the Hillside Manor
> leasing office. Hillside Manor and Quantum Residential are separate from
> the county and are not able to provide assistance to households that are
> not pursuing a unit at Blossom or Community Apartments.
>
> If you have questions about what is still needed or about next steps,
> please let me know and I can clarify.
>
>
>
> Thank you,
>

>
> While the intake packet was submitted to Quantum Residential staff at the

>
> To proceed, you may choose one of the following options:
>
>    - Ask Quantum Residential staff at the Hillside Manor leasing office

>
> I have worked on the porting paperwork, and I was going to work today on
> getting the 1 month tax return that would reset my business' tax year, and
> provide you with the statement of the 11-2025 to 12-2025 financial
> statements, and was going to send that and the restraining order documents,
> the porting documents to your office by priority mail, as soon as I can get
> those documents completed. But I also had to fire some college student
> junior developers for dishonesty / disloyalty / wage theft, and I had an
> interview with a new math PHD post-graduate researcher to replace them, so
> I've been behind on my deliverables as a result of that.
>
> Separately, I had Jimiliah Hart (i think that's how her name is spelled)
> call jane cortez again, and I was under the impression that the COO said
> there was only one person I would have to deal with, and that all
> correspondences would be done by writing, and I dont know why they're not
> being kept in writing. She represented by telephone that I was listed on
> the household, and wanted jane to go into some office at 2pm today, but I
> told her that I was already pursuing a lawsuit regarding the misconduct of
> your office, and had already sought a restraining order against you but
> only got to see a pro-tem (temporary) judge, who would not issue an order
> under the circumstances.

You should go talk to the Clackamas county counsel, and ask them about first amendment retaliation, and whether first amendment rights can be waived as a condition of a government benefit, and ask chatgpt before you send me legally frivolous notices. As you are aware the State of Oregon explicitly allows nudity during protests, including a man who got completely naked in front of the airport, and the offer while lewd does not amount to a "hostile work environment" claim, because I dont have any actual power over the officials workplace, your claim is merely that a government employee was exposed to offensive speech (not even nudity).

https://www.oregonlive.com/portland/2012/07/portlands_airport_stripper_joh.html

If you thought that it was inappropriate for me to communicate the problems that you are trying to cause with me and my mother, then you clearly should have anticipated the problems you were causing, before you had gone to the extent of causing those problems in the first place, and should have refrained from causing those problems to begin with. You should also be aware of the "unclean hands doctrine", whereby you cannot create a problem and then complain that the person whose problems you have caused, have exercised their first amendment right to petition the government for redress of grievances. 

https://www.congress.gov/crs-product/LSB11338

Moreover even if you wanted to enforce this letter you would have to explain the selective enforcement, for example not disenchanting Julio who admitted to fraud in a court, or my neighbor laura whose rental has been used as a storage facility, while she lives in a completely different house for 2 years, or my neighbor carlos who fabricates adopting his grandson to get another room on his lease, but instead only enforcing rules against the person who accuses your organization and their partners of legal wrongdoing. You would have to explain why some offensive speech was somehow a worse breach of conduct than actual financial fraud, and violations of racial discrimination laws, that went unpunished by the county.

https://www.eeoc.gov/laws/guidance/enforcement-guidance-retaliation-and-related-issues#3._Examples

You should have already been informed, that I am working on a neurosymbolic system to automate legal reasoning over the entire legal corpus, with the intention of using it against government bodies who flagrantly violate the laws and constitution of Oregon and the United States.
You should have also been aware or informed that I was intending this controversy to go to the US district court, whereby I was going to use the automated AI systems that I'm building to go after the county under the civil rights fraud initiative of the DOJ 

https://www.justice.gov/dag/media/1400826/dl?inline

That being said, the documents you have requested have been delivered to your organization, so tell me when you're going to resolve the outstanding problems that have been caused by your agency, so that I dont have any need to communicate with your agency any further, so that we can move out of the jurisdiction of clackamas county to begin with.

Mr. Barber,

 

Your recent communication with Ashely Ferron is both concerning and inappropriate. Per the email I sent you on December 11th, I noted that the Housing Authority expects that communication between HACC and those external to HACC (participants, community partners, etc.) is safe and respectful. This recent communication from you is a clear deviation from these expectations. Moving forward, you are to communicate with myself, only. Our communication will continue to be in writing to ensure that we have an accurate accounting and record of information being shared between the Housing Authority and you/your household. Communication will be strictly limited to discussing your household eligibility, voucher issuance, and next steps for your move. Further communication that is explicit or implicit harassment, sexual in nature, derogatory, abusive, intimidating, threatening or otherwise inappropriate will be once again considered violation of your lease with the Housing Authority.

 

I appreciate your attention to this serious matter and expect immediate correction to your interaction with the Housing Authority moving forward.

Kati
